home.title: Open Source OAuth Server
home.subtitle: Deploy a secure OAuth2.0/OIDC authentication server on Cloudflare

oauth.title: OAuth2/OIDC
oauth.description: Full OAuth2.0 and OpenID Connect support with multiple grant types

cloudflare.title: Cloudflare Powered
cloudflare.description: Deployed on Cloudflare Workers for global edge performance

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Built-in DDoS protection, WAF, and automatic SSL certificates

moreFeatures.title: Features
moreFeatures.item1: User registration, login, and password reset
moreFeatures.item3: OAuth2 authorization code and client credentials flows

register.title: Create Account
register.accountTypeUserHint: User accounts can bind XMOJ and manage their own authorizations.
register.accountTypeMerchantHint: Merchant accounts can create and manage OAuth applications.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: This account is an administrator. Enter the system management console for users, apps, and audit operations.

user.emptyAuthorizations: You have not authorized any applications yet.

step1.title: Create an Application
step1.description: Register your first OAuth application to get started

step2.title: Get API Credentials
step2.description: Obtain your App ID and Secret for authentication

step3.title: Integrate with Your App
step3.description: Use our OAuth2 endpoints to authenticate users

dashboard.title: System Management
dashboard.subtitle: Administrators can view global stats and jump to critical management actions here.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.manageAppsHint: Review all applications and perform block or warning actions.
quickActions.refreshStatsHint: Return to this page to refresh global statistics.
quickActions.accountSecurityHint: Update admin password and security settings.

form.name: Application Name
form.redirectUrisHelp: Comma-separated list of allowed redirect URIs
form.selectScopeRequired: Please select at least one scope

detail.secretWarning: ⚠️ Keep your client secret secure. It should never be exposed in client-side code.
detail.secretNote: Note: For security, the full secret is only shown once during creation.
detail.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All tokens will be invalidated.

authorize.title: Authorization Request
authorize.requesting: is requesting access to your account
authorize.permissions: This application will be able to:
authorize.footer: By authorizing, you allow this application to access your data according to their terms of service.
authorize.merchantForbidden: Merchant accounts are not allowed to authorize user access. Please sign in with a user account.

scopes.xmoj_profile: Read your bound XMOJ account information

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters

deleteApp.title: Delete Application
deleteApp.message: Are you sure you want to delete this application? This action cannot be undone and will invalidate all tokens.

xmoj.title: XMOJ Account Binding
xmoj.onlyUserCanBind: Only user accounts can bind XMOJ.
xmoj.mobileBookmarkHint: Mobile device detected. Default switched to manual input; bookmark flow is less reliable on mobile.
xmoj.bookmarkStep1: Drag the button to your bookmarks bar, or copy the code and create a bookmark manually.
xmoj.bookmarkStep2: Sign in on xmoj.tech, then click the saved bookmark.
xmoj.bookmarkStep3: You will be redirected back, auto-filled, and binding will start automatically.
xmoj.bookmarkLoginRequired: Please sign in to XMOJ first!
xmoj.bookmarkHelp: Copy the bookmarklet, save it as a browser bookmark, run it on xmoj.tech after login, and paste the PHPSESSID here.
xmoj.profileCheckHint: Verification rule: AuthMaster requests profile.php with your PHPSESSID, reads user_id, and strictly compares it with the input username.
xmoj.autoFillDetected: Session callback detected. Username {{username}} has been auto-filled.
xmoj.rebindHint: An XMOJ account is already bound. Unbind first to bind another account.
